basic_details.job_title: MPPGCL Managing Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: MP Power Generating Company (MPPGCL) Managing Director Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website of MPPGCL. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the MPPGCL Managing Director Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Additional Chief Engineer or above in Administrative/Technical/Finance or Management functions preferably in Power Sector Company
qualification.details: Managing Director: Experience in Administrative/Technical/Finance or Management functions having worked as Additional Chief Engineer or above in the respective cadre preferably in Power Sector Company

salary_details.details: Managing Director: Pay scale of Executive Director of the Company with similar perquisites

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MPPGCL Managing Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MPPGCL Managing Director Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MPPGCL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MPPGCL Managing Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MPPGCL Managing Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MPPGCL Managing Director Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications for the MPPGCL Managing Director post is 07 August 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach the specified address by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Managing Director post in MPPGCL?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Managing Director post in MP Power Generating Company (MPPGCL) recruitment 2026. This is a single, high-level position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the MPPGCL Managing Director position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the MPPGCL Managing Director post is 60 years. There are no specific age relaxations mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for MPPGCL Managing Director Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the MPPGCL Managing Director Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without any payment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Managing Director post in MPPGCL?
faq.answer: The salary for the Managing Director post will be as per the pay scale of an Executive Director of the Company, along with similar perquisites. Specific figures are not detailed in the summary.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for the MPPGCL Managing Director post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have experience in Administrative/Technical/Finance or Management functions, having worked as Additional Chief Engineer or above in the respective cadre, preferably in a Power Sector Company.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for MPPGCL Managing Director Recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the MPPGCL Managing Director post is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it by post along with required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the MPPGCL Managing Director position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the MPPGCL Managing Director post involves a Selection Committee. Further details regarding the committee's procedure would be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for the MPPGCL Managing Director post?
faq.answer: The job location for the MPPGCL Managing Director post is Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 462004. This indicates the primary operational base.

faq.question: Q10. When was the official notification for MPPGCL Managing Director released?
faq.answer: The official notification for the MPPGCL Managing Director recruitment was released on 03 July 2026. This marks the start of the application period.
